summary: Completed frontend-only testing of localkeys app. All 4 crypto tools (Nostr, JWT Secret, SSH Key, Argon2id) are fully functional. All outputs verified visually via screenshots.
critical_code_review_comments: OutputField uses data-testid on textarea directly (not wrapper div) — test selectors should use 'textarea[data-testid=...]' not '[data-testid=...] textarea'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: dark theme, Zero Knowledge badge, 4 tabs clickable, Nostr generates nsec1/npub1 keys, JWT generates 44-char Base64 and 64-char Hex, SSH generates OpenSSH PEM private key and ssh-ed25519 public key, Argon2id hashes in PHC format ($argon2id$...), empty password validation works, all params editable, footer mentions no server transmission. Playwright selectors for OutputField should use 'textarea[data-testid="nostr-nsec"]' pattern.
